sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_log (id INT, message VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_log (id, message) VALUES (1, dbg_printf('Log entry created with ID: %d', 1));
UPDATE test_log SET message = dbg_printf('Log entry %d updated', id) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT dbg_printf('Retrieving log entry %d', id), message FROM test_log WHERE id = 1;
DELETE FROM test_log WHERE id = 1 AND dbg_printf('Deleting entry with ID: %d', 1);
